title: 💟 Kuromi 💟 GUI & HOTBAR
description: This is a full customisation of the GUI and the hotbar kuromi themed !
body:
# New GUI dropped !!!

Hello I present to you, a new GUI I personally made and already posted on another platform
I already made a GUI but I'm very new to all of this and hope you can be understanding if mistakes are made.

Everything is customized, and kuromi themed I tried to keep the purple, and pink look kuromi has and it is very cute in my opinion I hope you will like it too.

I count on you to tell me your recommendations and the problems you encounter.

The Hotbar was inspire by _Miuni_ on planetminecraft check out the good work,

Thanks a lot ! 💟
